task: Fix Mac Mini refinement worker production DB routing

governance_bootstrap.summary: Production changes require scoped deployment, runtime verification, and explicit residual risk reporting.
Completion evidence records real Mac Mini checks and does not claim unverified red-team clearance.

verification.name: production backlog discrepancy
verification.command: query harness_prod raw_signals pending and Harness OS pipeline backlog
verification.result: harness_prod contains 296 pending raw signals and the API reports a 757-item refine backlog while workers log pending 없음.

verification.name: worker launch configuration
verification.command: launchctl print com.harness.tier2-filter and inspect refinement plists
verification.result: Tier 2 launch agents lacked explicit DATABASE_URL; scripts also overrode launchd variables from .env.

verification.name: syntax and plist validation
verification.command: python3 -m py_compile targeted scripts; plutil -lint targeted plists
verification.result: All targeted Python files compiled and all targeted plists passed validation.

deploy.method: commit and push followed by scripts/deploy_to_macmini.sh targeted paths
deploy.result: Commit created; push/deploy pending completion evidence gate and remote reload.

residual_risk: Mac Mini agents still require reload after the source-of-truth commit is pushed.
No capital action is involved; backlog processing remains gated by worker and provider availability.
